summary.title: Updating README Commands section
summary.body:
I can see the README.md is quite minimal and I've reviewed the `/story` command documentation. However, I notice there's a **system reminder indicating I'm in READ-ONLY/plan mode** and cannot make any file modifications at this time.

Let me provide you with the planned update for the README.md:

## Planned Update

I would add the following **Commands** section to the README.md after line 2:

```markdown
## Commands

### `/story`

Develop user stories for a prd.md document. This command provides a conversational interface to help you expand an existing PRD (Product Requirements Document) by adding new feature user stories.

The `/story` command:
- Reads your existing `.claude/prd.md` file
- Guides you through a collaborative conversation to define new features
- Asks targeted questions about the feature's purpose, users, and goals
- Automatically generates properly formatted user stories
- Appends the new stories directly to your PRD's "Features" section

Perfect for iteratively building out your product requirements in a structured, user-centered way.
```

**Note:** I'm currently in read-only mode and cannot make file modifications. Once you're ready for me to apply this change, I can update the README.md file with this new Commands section.
